name: Calendar
description: Calendar is a flexible, user-friendly calendar component for React applications. It allows users to view, select, and manage dates with ease. It can be controlled if you set value property, or uncontrolled otherwise.

props.name: autoFocus
props.description: The control's autofocus attribute

props.name: className
props.description: The control's wrapper class name

props.name: defaultFocusedValue
props.description: The date that is focused when the calendar first mounts (uncontrolled)

props.name: defaultMode
props.description: Initial mode to show in calendar

props.name: defaultValue
props.description: Sets the initial value for uncontrolled component

props.name: disabled
props.description: Indicates that the user cannot interact with the control

props.name: focusedValue
props.description: Set the default view of uncontrolled component which includes this value

props.name: id
props.description: The control's id attribute

props.name: isDateUnavailable
props.description: Callback that is called for each date of the calendar. If it returns true, then the date is unavailable

props.name: isWeekend
props.description: Callback that is called for each date of the calendar. If it returns true, then the date is weekend

props.name: maxValue
props.description: The maximum allowed date that a user may select

props.name: minValue
props.description: The minimum allowed date that a user may select

props.name: mode
props.description: Defines the time interval that Calendar should display in controlled way

props.name: modes
props.description: Modes available to user

props.name: onBlur
props.description: Fires when the control lost focus

props.name: onFocus
props.description: Fires when the control gets focus

props.name: onFocusUpdate
props.description: Fires when the control's focused date changes

props.name: onUpdate
props.description: Fires when the value is changed

props.name: onUpdateMode
props.description: Fires when the mode is changed

props.name: readOnly
props.description: Whether the calendar value is immutable

props.name: selectionMode
props.description: Whether single or multiple selection is enabled

props.name: size
props.description: The size of the control

props.name: style
props.description: Sets inline style for the element

props.name: timeZone
props.description: Sets the time zone

props.name: value
props.description: The value of the control

name: CalendarView

props.name: size
props.description: The size of the element. @default m

description: The size of the element. @default m

name: DateField
description: DateField component is a versatile and convenient input field specifically designed for date entry in React applications. It can be controlled if you set value property, or uncontrolled otherwise.

props.name: autoFocus
props.description: The control's autofocus attribute

props.name: className
props.description: The control's wrapper class name

props.name: defaultValue
props.description: Sets the initial value for uncontrolled component

props.name: disabled
props.description: Indicates that the user cannot interact with the control

props.name: endContent
props.description: User's node rendered after the input node and clear button

props.name: errorMessage
props.description: Error text

props.name: format
props.description: Format of the date when rendered in the input

props.name: hasClear
props.description: Shows the icon for clearing control's value

props.name: id
props.description: The control's id attribute

props.name: isDateUnavailable

props.description: Help text rendered to the left of the input node

props.name: maxValue
props.description: The maximum allowed date that a user may select

props.name: minValue
props.description: The minimum allowed date that a user may select

props.name: onBlur
props.description: Fires when the control lost focus

props.name: onFocus
props.description: Fires when the control gets focus

props.name: onUpdate
props.description: Fires when the value is changed by the user

props.name: parseDateFromString
props.type: (dateStr: string, format: string, timeZone?: string) => DateTime
props.description: Custom parser function for parsing pasted date strings

props.name: pin
props.description: Corner rounding

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Text that appears in the control when it has no value set

props.name: readOnly
props.description: Whether the component's value is immutable

props.name: size
props.description: The size of the control

props.name: startContent
props.description: User's node rendered before label and input

props.name: style
props.description: Sets inline style for the element

props.name: timeZone
props.description: Sets the time zone

props.name: validationState
props.description: Validation state

props.description: The value of the control

props.name: view
props.description: The view of the control

name: RelativeDateField
description: RelativeDateField component is used only for entering relative dates using Grafana-like relative format (e.g. now-1d, now/w). It cannot be used as a normal DateField.

name: RelativeDatePicker
description: RelativeDatePicker is almost the same component as DatePicker but it has ability to use relative dates. It can work in two modes: absolute and relative. You can switch it interactively by click on the f(x) button.
